name: Support With Control
description: Family support keeps survival possible but also increases control and proof pressure.
life_effect: Financial buffer is not fully independent until income separates from family approval.

financial_effect.reason: family support reduces collapse risk but limits independent optionality

name: Normal Stability Pressure
description: Family expects the person to prove normal stability before exploration.
life_effect: Stable work may raise cash buffer while delaying creative identity; conflict depends on pacing.

financial_effect.reason: stability pressure can create income but narrow exploration

name: Family Pressure Spending Defense
description: When family pressure and shame rise, money can be used defensively to feel less failed.
life_effect: This can leak buffer even when income improves.

financial_effect.reason: pressure and shame can leak money through defensive choices
